ingredients.item:
PASTA
Kosher salt
13 ounces (360 g) pasta shape of choice
ingredients.original:
PASTA
Kosher salt
13 ounces (360 g) pasta shape of choice

ingredients.item: ½ cup (12 g) packed basil leaves
ingredients.original: ½ cup (12 g) packed basil leaves

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 g) sliced Kalamata olives (or any other black olives)
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 g) sliced Kalamata olives (or any other black olives)

ingredients.item: ½ cup (25 g) shaved Parmesan cheese
ingredients.original: ½ cup (25 g) shaved Parmesan cheese

ingredients.item:
MUHAMMARA SAUCE
10 ounces (300 g) jarred roasted red peppers (about 3 large peppers)
1½ ounces (40 g) sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.original:
MUHAMMARA SAUCE
10 ounces (300 g) jarred roasted red peppers (about 3 large peppers)
1½ ounces (40 g) sun-dried tomatoes

ingredients.item: ½ cup (50 g) unsalted whole raw walnuts
ingredients.original: ½ cup (50 g) unsalted whole raw walnuts

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon ground Aleppo pepper (or substitute with 1 teaspoon paprika)
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon ground Aleppo pepper (or substitute with 1 teaspoon paprika)

ingredients.item: 1 To make the pasta: Fill a large pot with cold water, add salt, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the pasta and cook according to the package instructions for al dente.
ingredients.original: 1 To make the pasta: Fill a large pot with cold water, add salt, and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the pasta and cook according to the package instructions for al dente.

ingredients.item: 2 Meanwhile, make the muhammara sauce: Add all the sauce ingredients to a food processor and process for 1 minute until a smooth paste forms.
ingredients.original: 2 Meanwhile, make the muhammara sauce: Add all the sauce ingredients to a food processor and process for 1 minute until a smooth paste forms.

ingredients.item: 3 Add the muhammara sauce to a large, deep skillet and cook for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring often.
ingredients.original: 3 Add the muhammara sauce to a large, deep skillet and cook for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring often.

ingredients.item: 4 Drain the pasta, reserving 1 cup (240 ml) of pasta cooking water. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet along with the baby spinach, basil leaves, olives, and Parmesan. Mix everything together, then add the reserved pasta cooking water to loosen the sauce.
ingredients.original: 4 Drain the pasta, reserving 1 cup (240 ml) of pasta cooking water. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet along with the baby spinach, basil leaves, olives, and Parmesan. Mix everything together, then add the reserved pasta cooking water to loosen the sauce.

ingredients.item: 5 Garnish with more Parmesan, basil leaves, and black pepper. Serve immediately.
ingredients.original: 5 Garnish with more Parmesan, basil leaves, and black pepper. Serve immediately.
